appAiButlerPage.未配置模型_请先到_弹幕设置_API_与模型: No model configured; set up in Danmu Settings → API & model first
appAiButlerPage.凭证缺失_请检查_API_Key_与端点配置: Credentials missing; check API Key and endpoint settings
appAiButlerPage.AI_服务返回错误_error_请稍后再: AI service returned an error ({error}); please try again later
appAiButlerPage.AI_管家内部错误_请重试: AI Butler internal error; please retry
appAiButlerPage.应用设置超时_请重试: ❌ Apply settings timed out, please retry
appAiButlerPage.暂无模型档案_请到_弹幕设置_API_与模: (no model profiles—add in Danmu Settings → API & model)
appAiButlerPage.加载失败_请刷新页面重试: Load failed; refresh the page and retry
appAiButlerPage.我目前可以帮您调整弹幕设置_您可以试试说_把弹幕: I can answer usage questions or guide you to settings pages
appAiButlerPage.告诉我你想调整什么设置_例如_把弹幕速度调快: Ask anything, e.g.「where do I change danmu speed」
appAiButlerPage.有什么想问的_例如_弹幕速度在哪改: Ask anything, e.g.「where do I change danmu speed」
appAiButlerPage.我没听清_请换个说法再试试: I didn't catch that—please try rephrasing

appDanmuPoolPage.最多同时导入_5_个文件: Import at most 5 files at once
appDanmuPoolPage.部分字符无法识别: ; some characters could not be recognized
appDanmuPoolPage.请先输入要追加的弹幕句子: Enter danmu lines to append first

appErrorReporting.暂时无法查询提交额度: Cannot query submit quota right now
appErrorReporting.未配置云端反馈服务_无法在线提交: Cloud feedback not configured; cannot submit online

appLiveOverlayPanel.暂时无法读取直播输出状态_请确认控制台服务仍在运: Cannot read live output status; confirm console service is running.
appLiveOverlayPanel.先复制地址_粘贴到直播软件的浏览器源_网页源: Copy the URL first, then paste it into your streaming app's browser/web source.
appLiveOverlayPanel.地址已复制_保存直播软件的网页源后_连接数会自动: URL copied. After saving the web source in your streaming app, connections will show 1 or more.
appLiveOverlayPanel.已检测到网页源连接_发送测试弹幕_确认直播画面能: Web source connected. Send a test danmu to confirm it appears in your stream.
appLiveOverlayPanel.直播输出已接通_正式生成弹幕时会同步推送到网页源: Live output connected. Formal danmu generation will push to the web source.
appLiveOverlayPanel.复制失败_请手动选择复制: Copy failed; please select and copy manually

appMemeBarragePage.本地库与待展示队列已清除: Local library and display queue cleared

appPersonaTopicPage.为该人格选择模型_默认跟随全局_使用_模型: Pick a model for this persona (defaults to global「In use」model)
appPersonaTopicPage.主题已更新_下一次生成会使用新内容: Topic updated; next generation will use the new content
appPersonaTopicPage.昵称已更新_下一次生成会使用新内容: Nickname updated; next generation will use the new content
appPersonaTopicPage.名称显示已更新_下一次生成会使用新内容: Name display updated; next generation will use the new setting
appPersonaTopicPage.人格已更新_下一次生成会使用新内容: Persona updated; next generation will use the new content
appPersonaTopicPage.人格名称不能包含_等特殊字: Persona name cannot contain / \\ % # ? or other special characters
appPersonaTopicPage.激活人格已更新_下一次生成会使用新内容: Active personas updated; next generation uses new selection

appPetPage.已启用_将显示普通单桌宠_保存后生效: Enabled · single pet will show (after save)
appPetPage.已启用_已隐藏_可在桌宠右键菜单显示: Enabled · hidden (show via pet context menu)

appUpdateBanner.下载超时_请稍后重试: Download timed out; please try again later
appUpdateBanner.源码模式不支持应用内更新: Source mode does not support in-app update
appUpdateBanner.复制失败_请手动选择文本复制: Copy failed; please select text and copy manually
appUpdateBanner.GitHub_Releases_镜像链接已复制到: GitHub Releases mirror link copied to clipboard

contentAnnouncements.p_class_announcements: Cloud announcements not configured. Copy supabase-config.example.js to supabase-config.js and fill in project URL and key.

contentFeedback.暂时无法查询提交额度_2: Cannot query submit quota right now
contentFeedback.未配置云端反馈服务_无法在线提交_仍可通过下方社: Cloud feedback not configured; cannot submit online (contact via community below)
contentFeedback.反馈已提交_感谢你的帮助: Feedback submitted—thank you for your help~

diagnostics.检查弱网_上游模型响应时间或过慢的视觉请求: - Check weak network, upstream model latency, or slow visual requests
diagnostics.检查请求_timing_是否长时间未消费_重: - Check if request timing was not consumed for long; focus on reply/error cleanup path
diagnostics.当前快照未发现明显调度或_timing_异常: - No obvious scheduling or timing issues in current snapshot

logs.日志已关闭_点击_重新打开日志_按钮恢复显示: Logs closed. Click Reopen logs to restore.
logs.等待日志_点击_生成弹幕_后_截图_AI_请求: Waiting for logs… After Start danmu, capture, AI requests, and danmu events appear here in real time.
logs.正在通过_HTTP_同步日志_若长时间仍为空: Syncing logs via HTTP… If empty, confirm you clicked Start danmu and capture/AI activity exists.
logs.日志通道连接中_若超过数秒仍无内容_请点左侧: Log channel connecting… If empty after seconds, check connection in Dashboard header or restart DanmuAI.
logs.语言切换后日志已清空: Language switched; log view cleared. New logs after Start danmu will use the current language.

settingsCaptureRegion.正在框选_请在识图显示器上拖动鼠标_Esc_取消: Selecting… drag on capture display (Esc to cancel)
settingsCaptureRegion.获取识图区域状态失败: Failed to get capture region status
settingsCaptureRegion.请在识图显示器上拖动鼠标框选区域: Drag on the capture display to select a region~
settingsCaptureRegion.区域无效或过小_请重新框选: Region invalid or too small; please re-select

settingsCore.无法加载默认配置_请刷新页面后重试: Cannot load defaults; refresh and retry
settingsCore.当前分组无可恢复的表单项: No restorable fields in current group
settingsCore.已恢复默认值_请点击_保存配置_生效: Defaults restored; click Save settings to apply
settingsCore.步长为_stepAttr_请输入合规值: Step is {step}; enter a valid value

settingsCustomModels.p_class_text_sm_text_g: No model profiles yet—click Add above~
settingsCustomModels.模型_ID_长度超过_TAG_MAX_LEN: Model ID exceeds {maxLen} chars; not added
settingsCustomModels.确定删除模型_display_吗_该档案包: Delete model profile「{display}」? It has {n} model IDs. If default, the next profile becomes default.
settingsCustomModels.请至少添加一个模型_ID: Add at least one model ID

settingsDefaults.直播弹幕评论员_只输出_JSON_字符串数组_无: Live danmu commentator. Output JSON string array only—no explanation or Markdown.
settingsDefaults.每次固定_count_条_保存后会同步: Fixed {count} per batch · syncs to Persona Studio「Output contract」after save

settingsFonts.未获取会话令牌_请刷新页面或重启_DanmuAI_2: No session token; refresh or restart DanmuAI
settingsFonts.确认删除已导入字体_item_family: Delete imported font「{family}」? This cannot be undone.

settingsHints.视觉模型服务的网址_火山方舟豆包一般填到_ap: Visual model service URL. Volcengine Ark (Doubao) usually uses /api/v3; most OpenAI-compatible services use /v1.
settingsHints.doubao_火山方舟豆包_openai_其他兼: doubao: Volcengine Ark (Doubao). openai: other Chat-compatible services (e.g. some third-party proxies).
settingsHints.开启时开麦与识图共用上方_API_与模型_的接口: When on, mic uses the same API & model as capture above; when off, configure a mic-capable model in this tab.
settingsHints.为麦克风接话选择服务商预设_会自动填入麦克风_A: Pick a provider preset for mic replies; fills mic API endpoint and mode. OpenAI-compatible presets may not support audio—check model docs or enable「Supports microphone」in model profiles.
settingsHints.麦克风专用_API_地址_豆包一般填到_api: Mic-only API endpoint. Doubao usually /api/v3; MiMo and OpenAI-compatible services /v1.
settingsHints.麦克风请求使用的_API_模式_开麦需_doub: API mode for mic requests. Mic needs doubao multimodal or MiMo mimo-v2.5.
settingsHints.听懂麦克风并生成接话弹幕的模型_与识图视觉模型可: Model that hears the mic and generates reply danmu; can differ from the vision model.
settingsHints.麦克风专用_API_密钥_与识图密钥分开加密保存: Mic API key, encrypted separately from capture key. Blank save won't overwrite existing key.
settingsHints.实际调用的模型名称或接入点_ID_也可在下方_模: Model name or endpoint ID. You can also save multiple endpoint/key/model sets in「Model profiles」below.
settingsHints.截图和弹幕叠在哪块显示器上_编号无效时会自动改用: Which display to capture and overlay danmu on. Invalid index falls back to primary display.
settingsHints.创意程度_0_2_越高弹幕用词越发散_越低越稳: Creativity (0–2). Higher = more varied wording; lower = steadier, more formulaic tone.
settingsHints.单次_AI_回复允许的最长输出_开启_思考_类模: Max output length per AI reply. Thinking models get a higher effective minimum automatically.
settingsHints.每次说话时_附带最近多少秒的麦克风录音发给_AI: Seconds of recent mic audio sent with each utterance (1–30, default 5).
settingsHints.录大约_3_秒_检查麦克风是否有声音_不联网_不: Records ~3s to check mic input. No network, upload, or file save.
settingsHints.录大约_3_秒后_把声音和占位图发给_AI_确认: After ~3s, sends audio + placeholder image to AI to verify mic input.
settingsHints.访问_AI_的密钥_保存在本机并加密_留空点_保: API key stored locally encrypted. Leaving blank on Save won't overwrite existing key.
settingsHints.普通模式下_每隔多少秒识图并生成一批弹幕_1_6: In normal mode, seconds between capture and danmu batch (1–60).
settingsHints.普通模式下_每次识图固定生成几条弹幕_1_50: In normal mode, fixed danmu count per capture (1–50).
settingsHints.弹幕横向移动快慢_约_0_5_5_数字越大滚得: Horizontal danmu speed (~0.5–5). Higher = faster scroll.
settingsHints.屏幕上最多几行弹幕轨道_12_20_行: Max danmu track rows on screen (12–20).
settingsHints.AI_生成弹幕最多显示多少字_5_80_超出会: Target length for AI danmu (5–80); written into the prompt contract. Does not truncate on-screen text. Default ~20 CN / ~50 EN if unset.
settingsHints.横向弹幕使用的系统字体名_留空或填入不存在的字体: System font for horizontal danmu. Blank or invalid name uses default.
settingsHints.和最近弹幕有多像就算重复_0_1_越高越容易判: Similarity threshold vs recent danmu (0–1). Higher = more duplicates dropped; default ~0.5.
settingsHints.弹幕显示区域占整块屏幕的比例_全屏_四分之三_一: Danmu area as fraction of screen (full, 3/4, 1/2, 1/4).
settingsHints.全局快捷键_随时开始或停止生成弹幕_首次使用可能: Global hotkey to start/stop danmu. OS may ask to allow keyboard listening first time.
settingsHints.自然_按正常速度滚出屏幕_加速_换场景或清屏时让: Natural: normal scroll off screen. Accelerated: old danmu clear faster on scene change.
settingsHints.入口区_屏幕右侧待滚入_最多保留几条_pendi: Max pending danmu in entry zone (right edge). Default 300; 0 = unlimited. Drops farthest off-screen items, not new ones.
settingsHints.所有轨道上同时保留的弹幕总条数上限_新装默认_6: Max total danmu on all tracks. Default 600; 0 = unlimited; drops off-screen pending first.
settingsHints.AI_回复在入队等待上屏时的最大条数_0_表示不: Max queued AI replies before display. 0 = no trim; >0 drops oldest from front when exceeded.
settingsHints.某行轨道空了时_暂时加快滚动_让新弹幕更快占满空: When a track is empty, briefly speed up scroll to fill the gap.
settingsHints.横向弹幕_全屏透明_Overlay_横向滚动_从: Horizontal: full-screen transparent overlay scroll. Bottom-to-top: narrow right panel scrolls up. Use borderless/windowed fullscreen for games; exclusive fullscreen may hide danmu.
settingsHints.从下到上模式窗口宽度_200_800_px_默: Bottom-to-top panel width (200–800 px), right side by default.
settingsHints.从下到上模式的滚动速度_0_5_5_0_默认_1: Bottom-to-top scroll speed (0.5–5.0, default 1). Higher = faster (~120×speed px/s).
settingsHints.悬浮窗与屏幕右边缘的距离_px: Floating panel distance from right edge (px).
settingsHints.悬浮窗内每条弹幕的字号_12_48_px: Font size per danmu in floating panel (12–48 px).
settingsHints.悬浮窗同时显示的最多条数_超过时按_FIFO_丢: Max simultaneous danmu in floating panel; FIFO drops oldest.
settingsHints.发给_AI_前把截图缩到多宽_越小越省流量和费用: Screenshot width before sending to AI. Smaller = less bandwidth/cost; larger = sharper.
settingsHints.JPEG_压缩质量_1_100_默认_85_越高: JPEG quality 1–100, default 85. Higher = clearer, larger file.
settingsHints.用当前填写的地址_模式和密钥试连一次_AI_不开: Test AI with current endpoint, mode, and key—no danmu, no other changes.
settingsHints.描述本次要玩的游戏或直播主题_便于_AI_生成更: Game or stream topic for more contextual danmu. Empty = not injected; best under 50 chars, max 200.
settingsHints.你的昵称_AI_可在合适时自然称呼你_全局生效: Your nickname for AI to use naturally. Global, persona-independent; max 20 chars.
settingsHints.选择要编辑的人格模板_内置人格可覆盖保存_也可点: Persona template to edit. Built-ins can be overwritten; use Restore defaults to reset.
settingsHints.只读的_JSON_输出格式要求_每次生成条数与弹: Read-only JSON output contract. Count syncs with Danmu display settings; change count there.
settingsHints.追加到该人格系统提示词的风格与人格要求_点_保存: Extra style/persona appended to system prompt; applies after Save persona.
settingsHints.开启后按下方配置独立采集与展示烂梗弹幕_不与_A: When on, meme danmu are collected/displayed separately per settings below.
settingsHints.烂梗采集间隔_1_60_秒_每隔该秒数从源拉取: Meme collect interval (1–60s). Pulls a batch of candidates each interval.
settingsHints.烂梗展示间隔_1_60_秒_每隔该秒数从待展示: Meme display interval (1–60s). Shows danmu from queue each interval.
settingsHints.清空本地烂梗库与待展示队列_不影响已上屏弹幕: Clears local meme library and display queue; on-screen danmu unchanged.
settingsHints.启用后_系统会从你保存的自定义弹幕句中抽取短句: When on, pulls short lines from your custom pool when danmu count is low.
settingsHints.当屏幕上的弹幕少于该数量时_从自定义公式化弹幕库: When on-screen danmu fall below this, pull from custom pool. 0 disables fill.
settingsHints.一行一条短句_保存后上屏时完整展示_不截断_重复: One short line per row; full display on screen. Duplicates skipped.
settingsHints.勾选后可选中列表全部自定义句_便于批量删除: When checked, select all custom lines for batch delete.
settingsHints.开启后桌宠显示在桌面_临时隐藏请使用桌宠右键菜单: Shows desktop pet; use pet context menu to hide temporarily.
settingsHints.开启后桌宠窗口始终置顶_不会被其它窗口遮挡: Keeps pet window always on top.
settingsHints.开启后鼠标可穿透桌宠_但将无法拖动桌宠位置: Mouse passes through pet; dragging disabled.
settingsHints.开启后双击桌宠可弹出弹幕指令输入框: Double-click pet to open danmu command box.
settingsHints.指令提交后在此秒数内有效_5_300_秒_超时: Command valid for this many seconds (5–300), then expires.
settingsHints.一条指令最多影响几次截图弹幕生成_1_5_次: Max screenshot danmu generations per command (1–5).
settingsHints.在_Web_页调试注入弹幕指令_不会立即请求_A: Debug-inject danmu command on Web; merged into next normal capture, not immediate AI call.
settingsHints.从本地文件夹导入桌宠素材_目录需包含_pet_j: Import pet assets from folder with pet.json and spritesheet.webp or .png.
settingsHints.恢复为内置默认桌宠_不会删除你原来的本地素材文件: Restore built-in default pet; your local asset files are kept.
settingsHints.模型配置档案_为不同接口地址_模型_密钥保存多套: Model profiles: multiple endpoint/model/key sets with optional default; keys separate from global above.
settingsHints.随机_从全库抽取_自选_限选最多_3_个标签_本: Random: from full library. Custom: up to 3 tags. Local: imported meme lines only.
settingsHints.全展示_采集结果全部进入展示队列_AI识别展示: Show all: all collects go to display queue. AI pick: AI filters candidates by current screen.
settingsHints.仅_自选_分类时可选择标签_最多_3_个: Tags only for Custom category, max 3.
settingsHints.控制烂梗弹幕的采集节奏_间隔秒数与每批采集条数: Meme collect rhythm: interval seconds and batch size.
settingsHints.控制烂梗弹幕的上屏节奏_间隔秒数与每批展示条数: Meme display rhythm: interval seconds and batch size.
settingsHints.勾选多个人格后_运行时每轮随机选一个生成弹幕_点: Multiple checked personas: one random per round; Save active list to apply.

settingsMicTools.录音中_请对着麦克风随便念几句话: Recording… say a few words into the mic
settingsMicTools.请对着麦克风随便念几句话_约_3_秒: Say a few words into the mic (~3 seconds)
settingsMicTools.录音并发送中_请对着麦克风念几句话: Recording and sending… say a few words into the mic
settingsMicTools.录音约_3_秒后将发送到_AI_请对着麦克风说话: After ~3s recording, audio goes to AI—please speak into the mic

settingsProviders.已填入_provider_label_的默: Filled default endpoint for {providerLabel}; please enter the API key~
settingsProviders.已填入_provider_label_的默_2: Filled default mic endpoint for {providerLabel}; please enter the API key~

settings.模型目录加载失败_视觉模型列表可能为空_请刷新页: Model catalog load failed; vision list may be empty—refresh and retry
settings.默认跟随_Windows_当前默认录音设备_也可: Follows Windows default recording device; or pin a specific mic manually.
settings.当前已手动固定设备_如设备拔出_将在运行时回退到: Device pinned manually; if unplugged, runtime falls back to system default input.
settings.micHintDeviceUnavailable: Mic input unavailable: selected device missing; runtime falls back to system default ({defaultLabel}).
settings.micHintMimoRequired: {prefix}requires MiMo-V2.5 (mimo-v2.5). Current model「{modelId}」does not support mic; switch to mimo-v2.5 or enable「Same as capture model」in Mic tab, save, then start danmu.
settings.micHintNoMicSupport: {prefix}current model「{modelId}」does not declare mic_audio support. Enable「Supports microphone」in model profiles, use Doubao/MiMo, or configure separately in Mic tab.
settings.micHintPickMicModel: {prefix}current model「{modelId}」may not understand the mic. Pick a model with「Supports microphone」(e.g. doubao-seed-2-0-mini), save, then start danmu.
settings.所选设备不可用_已回退到系统默认: · Selected device unavailable, using system default
settings.麦克风输入设备不可用_已选择的设备当前不存在_运: Mic input unavailable: selected device missing; runtime falls back to system default (${defaultLabel ||
settings.麦克风可能无法识别你的声音: Mic may not recognize your voice:
settings.不支持开麦_请在麦克风标签改选_mimo_v: }」does not support mic; switch to mimo-v2.5 or enable「Same as capture model」in Mic tab, save, then start danmu.
settings.未声明_mic_audio_支持_请在模型配: }」does not declare mic_audio support. Enable「Supports microphone」in model profiles, use Doubao/MiMo, or configure separately in Mic tab.
settings.可能听不懂麦克风_请改选带_支持麦克风_的模: }」may not understand the mic. Pick a model with「Supports microphone」(e.g. doubao-seed-2-0-mini), save, then start danmu.
settings.当前默认模型来自模型配置档案_name: Default model from profile「{name}」({id}). API endpoint/key in Danmu Settings are not used for generation—maintain them in Model profiles.
settings.另外_当前_API_地址与已选模型目录不一致_保: Also: current API endpoint does not match selected model catalog; save may be rejected—re-select the vision model.

status.小助手正在为你生成暖心弹幕: Assistant is generating cozy danmu for you~
status.小助手正在待命_随时为你生成暖心弹幕: Assistant is on standby, ready to generate cozy danmu anytime~
status.另有升级前累计_formatTokenCou: Plus {legacyExtra} pre-upgrade tokens (input/output not split; included in historical total)
status.当前_API_地址与模型_st_active: Current API endpoint does not match model「{modelId}」; re-select vision model in Danmu Settings and save.

transport.请确认终端有_Web_控制台_HTTP_WS_已: Confirm terminal shows「Web console HTTP/WS listening」and URL is http://127.0.0.1:18765, then refresh.
transport.会话接口未返回_token_请重启_python: Session API did not return a token; restart python main.py and refresh the page
transport.接口不存在_请完全退出并重新运行_python: Endpoint not found; fully quit and rerun python main.py, then retry
transport.状态轮询失败_界面可能不是最新: Status poll failed; UI may be stale
transport.realtime_无法连接后端_WebSoc: [realtime] Cannot connect to backend WebSocket. Confirm python main.py is running,
transport.终端有_Web_控制台_HTTP_WS_已监听: Terminal shows「Web console HTTP/WS listening」and uvicorn[standard] (with websockets) is installed.
transport.可刷新页面或重启_DanmuAI: Refresh the page or restart DanmuAI.
transport.WebSocket_连接数已达上限_请关闭其他控: WebSocket connections full; close other console windows and refresh
transport.realtime_日志_WebSocket: [realtime] Log WebSocket not connected; will fall back to HTTP polling within ~1s.

app.当前模型支持风格指令_将用于控制语气与情感: Current model supports style instructions for tone and emotion.
app.MiMo_作为_user_消息控制语气_留空则仅: MiMo: sent as a user message to control tone; leave blank to read danmu text only.
app.当前模型可能忽略风格指令_留空则仅朗读弹幕正文: Current model may ignore style instructions; blank reads danmu text only.
app.未勾选_启用读弹幕_定时朗读不会启动_请勾选后: 「Enable danmu reader」not checked; timed reading won't start—check and save
app.无法连接小助手_请确认_DanmuAI_已启动: Cannot connect; confirm DanmuAI is running
